name: Cottage Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the cottage cheese through a sieve 2 times.
2. In a bowl, combine the butter, sugar, salt, flour, lemon rind, beaten egg yolks, raisins, nuts, and milk.
3. Stir well to ensure all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold the beaten egg whites into the cottage cheese mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a pie dish.
7. Bake in a moderately hot oven (400°F) for 30 minutes, or until browned and firm.
